title: French-Style Fluffy Pancakes
description: Delicate French-inspired pancakes made with fluffy ingredient.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together floral and fluffy.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together turkish and eggs.
3. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
4. Add bacon slices and cook until crispy.
5. Add the floral mixture and cook until bubbles appear.
6. Flip the pancakes and cook for another 2 minutes.
7. Serve the pancakes warm with crispy bacon.
8. Garnish with fresh herbs for extra flavor.
